basic_details.job_title: Uttarakhand Home Guard Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 152 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Homeguard Volunteer – Male Home Guard Volunteer
basic_details.department: Uttarakhand Homeguards & Civil Security Department, Dehradun
basic_details.short_information: The latest Office of District Commandant, Homeguards, Dehradun (Uttarakhand Home Guards) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Male Homeguard Volunteer posts! Published on 01 May 2026 at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 152 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18–40 years age group (with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/EWS and other reserved categories) and possessing a minimum qualification of 10th pass from a recognized board are eligible to apply offline from 01 May 2026 to 22 May 2026. Find all details about the Uttarakhand Home Guards new vacancy 2026

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on notice board & Facebook page Uttarakhand Home Guards

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the notification. Applications are submitted free of charge via personal visit or post to the office.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be minimum 18 years and maximum 40 years of age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is provided to SC/ST/OBC/EWS and other reserved categories as per Uttarakhand Government norms.

qualification.domicile: Permanent Resident of Dehradun District – domicile proof as per Govt. Order No. 2588/1–4/SA0PR0/2001 dated 20 Nov 2001
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application (22-05-2026). Only permanent residents of Dehradun district are eligible to apply. Domicile proof issued by competent authority of Dehradun will be required. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.pay_scale: Daily Duty Allowance as fixed by Govt. + Dearness Allowance + Washing Allowance

selection_process: Standard General/OBC/SC (Minimum) Scheduled Tribe (Minimum) Mountainous area (minimum)
without puffing out the chest 78.8 cm 76.3 cm 76.3 cm
on puffing out the chest 83.8 cm 81.3 cm 81.3 cm
01 Run and walk 02 km (Full Marks – 10) 9.1–10 minutes 05
Son, unmarried daughter, wife, husband of honorary and paid retired/working members of Home Guard 05
1st Tie-Break Candidate with higher age preferred (seniority of age)
2nd Tie-Break Higher marks in Physical Efficiency Test
The selection process consists of 3 successive stages - Physical Measurement (qualifying)
and final Merit List (60 marks total including bonus marks). Medically fit candidates from the final merit list will be selected.
Candidates failing physical measurement are declared unfit at that stage itself and removed from the selection process.
Note: Minimum 5 cm chest expansion is mandatory.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline only - either in person or by post - on the prescribed form. The form is available on the Facebook page Uttarakhand Home Guards and from the office notice board, Nanda Ki Chowki, Chakrata Road, Dehradun. Hard copy applications duly filled must be submitted to the office on any working day from 01.05.2026 to 22.05.2026 (by 11:59 PM).

Applications can also be submitted at: Jila Magistrate / SDM / Block / Tehsil / District Employment Office / Senior Superintendent of Police / District Sainik Welfare Office / Sol-Jar Board notice boards (as printed proforma, self-attested).
Documents to be submitted along with application form:
02 latest passport size self-signed colour photographs
Self-attested copy of educational qualification certificate (with date of birth mentioned)
Self-attested copy of Permanent Resident Certificate (as per Govt. Order No. 2588/1–4 dated 20 Nov 2001)
Self-attested copy of Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC if applicable)
Self-attested copy of EWS certificate (if applicable)
Self-attested copy of Hill Area Resident Certificate for physical standard relaxation (if applicable)
Submit Application to: District Commandant, Homeguards, Dehradun, Nanda Ki Chowki, Chakrata Road, Dehradun – PIN 248007
important_instructions: Only permanent residents of Dehradun district are eligible to apply. Candidates must possess the prescribed minimum qualification (10th pass) on the closing date. No online applications – offline submission only, in person or by post. Only one application per candidate will be accepted; if multiple found, only the first received will be considered. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates attending physical test / recruitment process. Homeguards department is not responsible for any accident during the recruitment process. Mobile phones and electronic gadgets are banned inside examination/test premises. Incomplete or incorrect applications will be rejected; full responsibility lies with the candidate. Candidates are advised to follow the Facebook page Uttarakhand Home Guards for all updates. Beware of touts and middlemen; report any such incident immediately to the toll-free numbers. Total number of vacancies may increase or decrease; no claim in this regard will be entertained. All decisions of the Recruitment Board are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026 is an offline recruitment drive by the Office of the District Commandant, Homeguards Dehradun, to fill 152 posts of Male Homeguard Volunteer for May–June 2026 under the Uttarakhand Homeguards & Civil Security Department.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 152 vacancies have been notified for Male Homeguard Volunteers, out of an approved strength of 1,038 posts, with 886 already filled and 152 posts lying vacant.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for Dehradun Homeguard Volunteer 2026?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 01 May 2026 and the last date for submitting duly filled application forms in person or by post to the District Commandant Homeguards, Dehradun, is 22 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q4. Who can apply for Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only permanent residents of Dehradun district are eligible to apply, and they must possess a valid domicile certificate issued by a competent authority of Dehradun as per the applicable Government Orders.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for Dehradun Male Homeguard posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is 10th pass from any recognized board or institution approved by the Uttarakhand State Government; possessing NCC/NSS/Scout Guide certificates and knowledge of the local language is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 40 years of age as on 01 January 2026, with a relaxation of up to 5 years for SC, ST, OBC, Freedom Fighter dependants and other reserved categories, as per Uttarakhand Government norms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No recruitment or application fee has been prescribed in the notification; candidates can submit their applications free of cost, either personally or by post to the designated address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Dehradun Homeguard Volunteer 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of three stages: Physical Measurement (qualifying), Physical Efficiency Test (PET) carrying 30 marks, and preparation of a final merit list out of 60 marks (including marks for PET, education, NCC/NSS/Scout, Homeguard family, sports and vehicle driving), followed by a medical examination for medically fit candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What are the physical standards and PET details for Dehradun Homeguard posts?
faq.answer: Male candidates must meet the minimum height and chest measurements as per category and area (General/OBC/SC, ST, and mountainous region), including at least 5 cm chest expansion, and must qualify the PET comprising a 2 km run/walk, cricket ball throw and long jump, each evaluated on a 10‑mark scale.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for Dehradun Homeguard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must download or collect the prescribed application form from the Dehradun Homeguards Facebook page or office notice board, fill it completely, attach self‑attested copies of required documents (educational, domicile, caste, EWS, hill area, character certificate, NOC, etc.) and submit it in person or by post to the District Commandant, Homeguards, Dehradun, Nanda Ki Chowki, Chakrata Road, Dehradun – 248007, on or before 22 May 2026.
